MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Paul K. Lee; FINKELSTEIN & FUJI LLP; Tel. (650) 353-4503; Appearing in person on behalf of plaintiff Pasquale Dianda

Lan Le; defendant in pro per; Tel. (415) 595-8359; appearing in person on their own behalf.

Hearing in Dept 505 for MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION

The Court hears argument and issues a tentative ruling to GRANT the motion. The Court takes a short recess to allow the parties to discuss an agreement.

Court resumes. All are present. The Court GRANTS the Motion for Preliminary Injunction on the condition that within 90 days from today, at his expense, the plaintiff obtains a permit to rebuild the stairs without a firewall. If plaintiff fails to do so, the preliminary injunction will be dissolved. Mr. Lee, on behalf of the plaintiff, is to prepare a proposed order, approved as to form and submit to Department 501 for signature. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: R. Gumpal, Not reported (505).
